GameConditionDef.label: lustful fertility pulse
GameConditionDef.description: A localized psychic ripple is overloading the reproductive instincts of all adult humans on the map.
GameConditionDef.letterText: A strange psychic pulse is affecting the region. Adults are feeling an overwhelming pressure to procreate.

IncidentDef.label: Lustful fertility pulse
IncidentDef.letterText: A strange psychic pulse has washed over the region. Children are merely confused by the shifting atmosphere, but all the adults are feeling an overwhelming biological pressure to procreate. Men feel rejuvenated, while women feel the calling of motherhood. Even their bodies reject infertility!

HediffDef.label: Psychic confusion
HediffDef.description: Confused by the strange behavior of the adults around them.

HediffDef.label: Lustful vigor
HediffDef.description: An intense psychic surge driving up reproductive capabilities and energy.

HediffDef.label: Mating pressure
HediffDef.description: An overwhelming psychic biological pull sending ovulation in overdrive and skyrocketing the maternal instinct.

HediffDef.label: Reproductive bliss
HediffDef.description: The planet has shifted supports this vessel of new life. The pawn feels a cosmic, euphoric validation that they are fulfilling their true evolutionary purpose, though the sheer intensity of this biological bliss leaves them in a heavily dazed, dreamlike state.

li.label: Confused by the adults
li.description: The adults are acting so weird and funny today... I wonder what's going on.

li.label: Feeling vigorous
li.description: I feel an incredible surge of primal energy flowing through me. All the women belong to me.

li.label: Reproductive pressure
li.description: I feel compelled to find a partner. My clock is ticking. I MUST FIND A MATE. NOW.

li.label: Maternal bliss
li.description: The world itself smiles upon me. I am a vessel for new lives... my purpose is clear, and I am fulfilling it.
